## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content marketing progress, performance, and transition to new team members.](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New GrowthX team members (Daryl, Ehtisham) introduced; transition plan in progress](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Content performance holding steady; some metrics diverging between GSC and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Need to analyze performance by topic clusters for strategic content planning](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Upcoming focus on refreshing older articles and maintaining knowledge transfer](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Daryl: Ex-journalist, 1.5 months at GrowthX, experience in content production, organic search](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Ehtisham: 13 years in content marketing, diverse roles (writer to product marketing), AI platform experience](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [12 articles published last week, 2 in edit phase](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Sessions stable, views decreased (expected after previous week's outlier)](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Top performers: data engineering, ETL, ELT, Medallion architecture](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [GSC shows increased clicks/impressions; GA4 data diverging but overall positive trend](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Return direct traffic volatile but average rising](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [LLM referrals stable; ChatGPT highest referral source](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Need for breakdown by topic clusters to identify underperforming areas](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Plan to expose backend Looker data for better category analysis](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Goal: Inform decisions on content priorities, rewrites, or approach changes](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Transition and Knowledge Transfer

  - [Articles split between current and new team for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [GrowthX to share "Atlas" tool walkthrough for content artifact visibility](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining partnership in topic selection and execution](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Content Refresh and Priorities

  - [Recent events (Databricks Summit, AI agents) necessitate content updates](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Plan to review and potentially refresh knowledge base docs](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [New thought leadership material to be distilled and incorporated](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide loom video of "Atlas" tool for Prophecy team visibility](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Schedule review of knowledge base docs for potential updates/gardening](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Prophecy to compile recent thought leadership material for content integration](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Add topic cluster performance breakdown to future meeting agendas](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content consistency during team transition](https://fathom.video/share/hAa9yajDMFVUeWMS-54ynr3Bxg_kQjPV?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
